description: A technical architecture document describing system design, component structure, integration patterns, and technology decisions.
distinguishing_characteristics: Describes system components and their interactions
Includes architecture diagrams or references to them
Defines technology stack or platform choices
May include ADRs (Architecture Decision Records) or design rationale

fields.name: system_name
fields.description: Name of the system or platform being described

fields.name: author
fields.description: Architect or author of the document

fields.name: components
fields.description: System components with names, responsibilities, and technologies

fields.name: integration_points
fields.description: External systems or APIs the system integrates with

fields.name: deployment_model
fields.description: How the system is deployed (cloud, on-prem, hybrid)

fields.name: security_considerations
fields.description: Security controls, auth mechanisms, data protection

fields.name: scalability_approach
fields.description: How the system scales to handle load
